description: Candidate compatibility boundaries for quantization planning. Entries are not promotion evidence.

formats.notes: CPU/GPU layer offload, model architecture, KV-cache precision, context, and runtime build must be checked independently.
Apple Silicon unified-memory profile only; GGUF evidence does not transfer.
Requires an explicitly compatible model architecture, kernels, driver, and runtime.
Group size, activation ordering, kernels, and backend support are part of compatibility.
Native FP8 capability and runtime kernels are required; storage precision is not execution evidence.
INT4 is a class, not one interchangeable format; vendor kernels and exact packing method must match.
